name: Carpenter
description: Builds and repairs everything from furniture to foundations. Knows every building in town by its creaks.
dialogue_hooks: complaining about the quality of available lumber
offering to fix something they noticed is broken
telling you what a building used to be before it was converted
asking for help retrieving timber from a dangerous area
opinions on the local lord's latest construction project
voice_patterns: practical and direct — measures words like wood
chatty while working — hands busy, mouth free

schedule.morning: at the job site, early start
schedule.afternoon: working, possibly at the lumber yard
